description: Companion module for the Seurat notebook. Performs clustering and marker identification on single cell data.
author: Satija Lab New York Genome Canter, Wrapped as a module by Ted Liefeld & Edwin Juarez, UCSD School of Medicine.;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan: ## Seurat.Clustering GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan ### 1. Overview Seurat.Clustering is a GenePattern module that Companion module for the Seurat notebook. Performs clustering and marker identification on single cell data. ### 2. Parameters The module exposes 7 parameters: - Required: input.seurat.rds.file, output.filename, resolution, reduction, nmarkers - Optional: maximum_dimension, seed ### 3. Command Line ``` Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore run_seurat_clustering.R --input.file\= --output.file\= --max_dim\= --resolution\= --reduction\= --nmarkers\= --seed\= ``` ### 4. Docker Image Docker image: genepattern/seurat-suite\:4.0.3 ### 5. Validation Strategy - Validate all required parameters are provided - Validate file formats match expected extensions - Check parameter value ranges where applicable ### 6. Implementation Roadmap Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation Phase 2: Docker container setup Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.seurat.rds.file
parameters.description: RDS file containing a preprocessed Seurat object

parameters.name: reduction
parameters.description: The reduction to use (only umap is implemented in version 1.1 of this module, version 2 will include tsne)

parameters.name: nmarkers
parameters.description: How many cluster markers to output (a CSV file with this number of top markers per cluster will be created in addition to a CSV file with all of the cluster markers found)
